prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built 455ci (7.5L) Pontiac V8 (engine code: 455 HO) with forged internals from Eagle Specialty Products (ESP), including a 4.25" stroker crank, H-beam connecting rods, and forged aluminum pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio). Pair with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (PN: 280H-10) featuring 280°/288° duration and 0.580"/0.590" lift for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) mounted on a custom stainless steel header system by Stainless Works, with a Turbosmart 60mm wastegate (PN: 4560) and a TiAL MV-R 50mm blow-off valve. Intercooled with a custom air-to-water setup using a PWR North America heat exchanger and a Bosch 044 fuel pump for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with Global West Double Adjustable Control Arms (PN: GWS-101) for precise rear axle location, paired with QA1 Proma Star coilovers (PN: RS1000X) featuring 22-way adjustable damping. Front end reinforced with Hotchkis Sport Sway Bars (PN: 1103F) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (PN: 9.5111R). Braking upgraded to Baer 6P calipers (PN: 6060075) with 14" two-piece rotors and Hawk DTC-70 brake pads for track use.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Rare Rides Motorsports (RRM) GTO-specific kit (PN: RRM-GTO-WB-68), extending fenders by 3.5" front and 4" rear with carbon fiber overfenders and integrated side skirts. Rear quarter panels reinforced with steel flares for durability.

Front end restomod with a custom billet aluminum grille from US Speed Designs (PN: USD-68GTO-GRILLE) featuring a hidden tow hook and integrated LED turn signals. Headlights upgraded to Hella H4 Bi-Xenon projectors with custom C-shaped DRLs from Diode Dynamics (PN: DD1500).

Interior reupholstered in Alcantara and leather by Katzkin (PN: KAT-68GTO-CUSTOM), featuring Recaro SRD-X seats (PN: SRD-9009) with 4-point Schroth harnesses (PN: ASM4203B). Custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (PN: API-6PT-GTO) with integrated fire suppression system (PN: SPA Technique 5L).
